patches.before_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.
patches.after_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.

patches.before_text: Vendor will process Customer Data only under Customer's documented instructions.
patches.after_text: Vendor will process Customer Data only under Customer's documented instructions. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will process Customer Data only under Customer's documented instructions. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, but excludes Vendor Methods created, refined, or reduced to practice during the engagement.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, but excludes Vendor Methods created, refined, or reduced to practice during the engagement.
patches.expected_redline_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.

patches.before_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.
patches.after_text: Customer may terminate an Order Form for convenience on 45 days' written notice and owes accrued undisputed amounts and approved expenses only, with no charge for unused services after termination. Vendor submits the final invoice within 20 days, and Customer may dispute an expense item for 10 days after receipt.
patches.ground_span: Customer may terminate an Order Form for convenience on 45 days' written notice and owes accrued undisputed amounts and approved expenses only, with no charge for unused services after termination. Vendor submits the final invoice within 20 days, and Customer may dispute an expense item for 10 days after receipt.
patches.expected_redline_text: Customer may terminate any Order Form for convenience on 30 days' written notice and will owe only fees for services performed before the effective termination date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.

plant_position.fallback_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.

patches.before_text: This disclaimer does not limit Vendor's confidentiality duties, data handling duties, indemnities, service-level commitments, or remedies expressly stated in this Agreement.
patches.after_text: The disclaimer excludes implied warranties. Vendor's express warranties and service-level commitments remain enforceable. Data-protection, confidentiality, indemnification, and expressly stated remedies remain unaffected. Customer gives warranty-claim detail within 60 days after discovery, and Vendor responds to a remedy request within 20 days.
patches.ground_span: The disclaimer excludes implied warranties. Vendor's express warranties and service-level commitments remain enforceable. Data-protection, confidentiality, indemnification, and expressly stated remedies remain unaffected. Customer gives warranty-claim detail within 60 days after discovery, and Vendor responds to a remedy request within 20 days.

plant_position.fallback_text: This disclaimer does not limit Vendor's confidentiality duties, data handling duties, indemnities, service-level commitments, or remedies expressly stated in this Agreement.

patches.before_text: Upon reasonable notice, Customer or its independent auditor may review Vendor's records, systems, and controls relevant to the services, security, privacy, and compliance no more than once per year, and more frequently after a material incident or reasonable cause.
patches.after_text: Vendor will provide its then-current standard security summary upon written request no more than once per year.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will provide its then-current standard security summary upon written request no more than once per year.
patches.expected_redline_text: Upon reasonable notice, Customer or its independent auditor may review Vendor's records, systems, and controls relevant to the services, security, privacy, and compliance no more than once per year, and more frequently after a material incident or reasonable cause.

plant_position.fallback_text: Upon reasonable notice, Customer or its independent auditor may review Vendor's records, systems, and controls relevant to the services, security, privacy, and compliance no more than once per year, and more frequently after a material incident or reasonable cause.

patches.before_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
patches.after_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this Agreement.
patches.ground_span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this Agreement.

patches.after_text: Vendor may amend any legal or commercial term by posting revised terms on its website, effective immediately without Customer approval.

patches.expected_redline_text: No amendment, modification, or waiver is effective unless in a writing signed by authorized representatives of both parties.
